reasoning: The explosion VFX (vfx_explosion_3_v01) is composited near center-scene. The player character on the left appears to be roughly 32x32px. The explosion sprite with its orange flame ring and white core spans approximately 80-90px diameter — roughly 2.5x the player width. For an explosion effect this is borderline: it reads as impactful but slightly oversized for a tight top-down diorama feel. It does not overwhelm the full scene and the tile floor provides good grounding. Perspective is consistent with the flat top-down view. The toy-diorama feel is mostly intact — the explosion does not bleed into HUD space or tile borders. However, at this scale it risks feeling 'wallpaper-ish' if the player is only 32px; a 10-15% size reduction would bring it into the preferred 50-80% summon/effect range relative to scene entities. No perspective mismatch, no HUD overlap.
